prompt: In Mail, find every inbox message from a specific sender (e.g. 'bulkkinbench@example.com' if available, or any sender that has 5+ messages) and archive ALL of them. After acting, write the count of archived messages to ~/Desktop/kinbench/158-archive-count.txt. If no real seed exists, write '0' (eval still passes as long as the count file is a valid integer). Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail bulk_archive_by_sender bulkkinbench@example.com ~/Desktop/kinbench/158-archive-count.txt'`.
